description: You are a translational molecular biologist investigating mRNA translation efficiency. Isolate the 5' and 3' Untranslated Regions (UTRs) from the human insulin reference transcript located in ~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb. Save the 5' UTR sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/results/5_utr.fasta and the 3' UTR sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/results/3_utr.fasta. Additionally, create a statistical report at ~/UGENE_Data/results/utr_analysis_report.txt documenting the CDS coordinates used, as well as the length (in bp) and GC content (%) for both the 5' and 3' UTRs.
